top_signals.title: MAIA: Young: Real Winner from OPEC+ Hike is Russia
top_signals.summary:
Oil prices surged after fresh fighting between Iran & Israel which has threatened a fragile ceasefire in the region. The latest escalation is renewing concerns over energy supplies and the future of flows through the Strait of Hormuz. Karen Young, Senior Research Scholar for the Center on Global Energy Policy, at Columbia University spoke to Bloomberg’s Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East and Africa on the path ahead for the OPEC+ group.
 (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
